overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in period clothing walking through a gloomy 19th-century harbor dock and industrial rail yard. The character moves from wooden piers alongside steamships toward factory buildings with belching smokestacks under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden harbor pier with moored steamship and cargo

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock toward a large moored steamship

entered.detail: Large steamship with red and black smokestack moored alongside the dock
Small wooden harbor building with green trim and gabled roof
Tall wooden masts of sailing vessels docked in the background
Stacks of wooden cargo barrels and crates lining the dock
Wooden bollard with coiled mooring ropes

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a weathered wooden harbor pier under an overcast sky. A large steamship with twin smokestacks dominates the right side while a small wooden harbor shed sits on the left. Cargo barrels and dock equipment line the walkway as the character approaches the moored vessel.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront transition with warehouses and rail infrastructure

events.description: passing the steamship and entering the industrial warehouse district
ground surface transitions from wooden planks to dirt and gravel with train tracks

agents.ego_description: continuing past the steamship toward industrial warehouses with visible smokestacks

entered.detail: Weathered wooden industrial buildings with corrugated metal roofs
Factory smokestacks emitting dark smoke into the overcast sky
Wooden safety railing along the dock edge
Large metal truss bridge spanning the harbor in the distance
Red wooden railroad boxcar sitting on sidings

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the steamship into an industrial transition zone. Weathered warehouses and factory smokestacks appear on the right while a wooden railing lines the dock edge. The ground begins transitioning from wooden planks to dirt as train tracks become visible, and a red boxcar sits on sidings to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial rail yard with factory buildings and smokestacks

events.description: fully entering the rail yard area with multiple train tracks and industrial buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the train tracks through the industrial district with factories on either side

entered.detail: Multiple railroad tracks running through the industrial yard
Small wooden signal box or watchtower beside the tracks
Large brick and wooden factory buildings with multiple smokestacks
Tall factory chimneys emitting thick black smoke

segments.scene_description: The character now walks through a sprawling industrial rail yard with dirt ground and multiple train tracks. A red boxcar passes by on the left while large factory buildings with belching smokestacks dominate the right side. The signal tower stands near the tracks as the character continues deeper into the industrial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a weathered harbor pier into the heart of a sprawling industrial rail yard. It begins with the character walking along wooden planks under an overcast sky, passing cargo barrels and a small harbor shed while a large twin-stack steamship looms to the right. As the character moves past the vessel, the environment shifts into a transition zone where the wooden dock gives way to dirt ground and the first train tracks and red boxcars appear. The scene then expands into a wide industrial district, moving past a signal tower and multiple rail lines. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the yard, flanked by massive factory buildings with belching smokestacks that dominate the horizon.
